name: Aneurysm Coils — Framing & Filling
pi: Fabian Holzberger, Markus Muhr, Barbara Wohlmuth
institution: Department of Mathematics, Technical University of Munich
description: Endovascular coil meshes from Holzberger et al. (2024), simulated via the discrete elastic rod model.
spp_project: Multi-scale algorithms and simulation methodologies for the long-term prognosis of endovascular interventions in cerebral aneurysms
